hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -iE "(SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE|SERVICE_ROLE_KEY|service.role|OCR_PROVIDER_KEY|OPTIMIZER_INTERNAL_TOKEN|TMAP_API_KEY|NAVER_MAP_CLIENT_ID)" && echo "BLOCK: service role / secret key detected in tool input. R3 violation — requires explicit user approval. See docs/GOVERNANCE.md §4 R3" && exit 1 || exit 0'

bash -c 'echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -iE "(force.push|reset\s+--hard|rm\s+-rf|DROP\s+(TABLE|DATABASE|SCHEMA)|push\s+--force|checkout\s+\.)" && echo "BLOCK: destructive command detected. See docs/GOVERNANCE.md §4 R3" && exit 1 || exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -E "infra/supabase/migrations/" && echo "WARNING: migration file modification detected (R3). Requires user approval per docs/GOVERNANCE.md §5" || exit 0'
